commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=2a2d5393dbc78b1b7609f11a9c5c58d1de65ebe3)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds list-time reconciliation for Skill Workshop proposals so pending create/update proposals become stale when the target skill already exists or is missing, with focused service tests.

PR surface: Source +36, Tests +68. Total +104 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main’s `listSkillProposals({ workspaceDir })` returns pending manifest entries without checking target skill presence, while the gateway/UI consume that status directly; I did not execute tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer follow-up is needed to fix the lifecycle race and provide real behavior proof; this should not be routed to automated repair while proof is missing.

target.title: fix(skills): reconcile stale workshop proposals when target skill exists or is missing
target.body:
## Summary

When a pending `create` proposal's target skill file already exists (e.g. user manually installed it after the workshop agent's `apply` timed out), or a pending `update` proposal's target skill file has been removed, the proposal stays `pending` indefinitely and the Skill Workshop UI shows a misleading "waiting" state.

## Fix

Add `reconcileStaleProposals()` called from `listSkillProposals()` to auto-mark such proposals as `stale` before the UI reads them:

- **create proposal**: if the target skill file already exists → mark stale with reason "Target skill already exists in workspace."
- **update proposal**: if the target skill file has been removed → mark stale with reason "Target skill is missing from workspace."

Also extract `markProposalStale()` as a shared helper, replacing duplicate inline stale-marking at three existing call sites (`reviseSkillProposal`, `assertSupportTargetUnchanged`, `readApplyTargetState`).

## Behavior addressed

Issue #90388: Skill Workshop proposal can remain shown as `waiting` even after skill is already active

## Real environment tested

Node v22.22.0, Vitest 4.1.7, temp workspace directories, Linux x86_64

## Exact steps or command run after this patch

```
pnpm test -- src/skills/workshop/service.test.ts
```

## Evidence after fix (terminal capture):

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  24 passed (24)
   Start at  01:09:18
   Duration  6.69s

Three new tests:
 ✓ reconciles pending create proposals as stale when the target skill already exists
 ✓ reconciles pending update proposals as stale when the target skill is missing
 ✓ keeps pending proposals as pending when no reconciliation is needed

Gateway proposals tests also pass:

 Test Files  2 passed (2)
      Tests  10 passed (10)

## Observed result after fix

All 24 workshop service tests pass (3 new + 21 existing). All 10 gateway skill proposals tests pass. Lint clean. The reconciliation logic correctly detects stale proposals at list time.

## What was not tested

- Does not cover live UI behavior in a running gateway.
- Update proposals where target content changed (but not deleted) are already caught at apply-time by `readApplyTargetState()`'s `currentContentHash` check; reconciliation deliberately keeps these as pending.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>
target.author: chengzhichao-xydt
